---
title: Voting Statistics
format:
  dashboard:
    orientation: columns
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  error: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
source("functions.R")

data = readxl::read_xlsx(here::here("whiteboardpollresults.xlsx")) %>%
  filter(status == "complete") %>%
  mutate(
    across(everything(), ~ replace_na(.x, 0)), 
    votes = hq_votes + rtp_votes) %>%
  group_by(series_no, series, week, question) %>%
  mutate(
    N = sum(votes), 
    share = round( (votes/N) * 100, 2)) %>%
  ungroup()

pollsasked = length(unique(data$question))
votescounted = sum(data$votes)

mostvoted = unique((data %>% filter(votes == max(data$votes, na.rm = TRUE)))$option)
mostvotes = max(data$votes, na.rm = TRUE)
mostvotes_poll = pull(filter(data, votes == mostvotes), series)
mostvotes_question = pull(filter(data, votes == mostvotes), question)

mostunanimous = unique((data %>% filter(share == max(data$share, na.rm = TRUE)))$option)
mostunanimous_pct = max(data$share, na.rm = TRUE)
mostunanimous_poll = pull(filter(data, share == mostunanimous_pct), series)
mostunanimous_question = pull(filter(data, share == mostunanimous_pct), question)

leastvoted = unique((data %>% filter(votes == min(data$votes, na.rm = TRUE)))$option)
fewestvotes = min(data$votes, na.rm = TRUE)
fewest_poll = pull(filter(data, votes == fewestvotes), series)
fewest_question = pull(filter(data, votes == fewestvotes), question)

leastunanimous = unique((data %>% filter(share == min(data$share, na.rm = TRUE)))$option)
leastunanimous_pct = min(data$share, na.rm = TRUE)
leastunanimous_poll = pull(filter(data, share == leastunanimous_pct), series)
leastunanimous_question = pull(filter(data, share == leastunanimous_pct), question)
```

## Summary Statistics

***`r pollsasked`*** polls conducted

***`r votescounted`*** votes counted

## Superlatives

[Highest]{style="color: #4B824F"} vote count: ***`r mostvotes`*** for ***`r mostvoted`***
(Poll: `r mostvotes_poll`, Question: `r mostvotes_question`)

[Most unanimous]{style="color: #4B824F"} vote: ***`r mostunanimous`*** with a *resounding* ***`r mostunanimous_pct`*** % of the votes
(Poll: `r mostunanimous_poll`, Question: `r mostunanimous_question`)

[Lowest]{style="color: #824B4B"} vote count: ***`r fewestvotes`*** for ***`r leastvoted`***
(Poll: `r fewest_poll`, Question: `r fewest_question`)

[Least unanimous]{style="color: #824B4B"} vote: ***`r leastunanimous`*** with ***`r leastunanimous_pct`*** % of the votes
(Poll: `r leastunanimous_poll`, Question: `r leastunanimous_question`)
